ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-27-2003 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2003 Continued To Jun-09-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 1, 2003
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Robert Sellards, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Diane A. Gable. Luis Molina, Esq. represented Karol R. Kolasa, Guardian ad Litem. Also, present Mino Raeann Buttle. In open court, Application and Order for appointment of guardian ad litem was signed appointing Karol R. Kolosa as the guardian ad litem for the minor. Mr. Molina stated for the record that Minor Raeann Buttle who appears as the defendant in this action, is dismissed, releasing and discharging any interest in subject property. Plaintiff is to dismiss minor from this action. Quit Claim Deed filed. Each party to bear own costs and fees. Petitioner, Diane A. Gable was sworn and examined. Based on the evidence received, the Court orders title in property is vested on Diane A. Gable. After the conclusion of the calendar, plaintiff presents the Court proof that a dismissal has been filed regarding Minor Reann Buttle. Order signed in open court.
